headline: Man Wins 'Best Dad Joke' Competition With A Joke That Wasn't A Joke, Just A Fact
summary: 'I'm a dad,' he said. 'That's the joke.' He won by a landslide. The audience was confused but appreciative.
fullBody: Jake won a dad joke competition by saying 'I'm a dad.' That was it. 'It's not a joke,' the judges said. 'It's a statement.' The audience laughed anyway. 'I think it's the delivery,' one judge said. Jake has since been offered a comedy special. 'I'll tell people I'm a dad,' Jake said. 'It'll kill.' His kids are embarrassed. 'He's not funny,' one said. 'He's just a dad.' That's the joke.
